contentList.content: Unlock 4th Level Spell Slots
You can now cast 4th level spells.
Unlock 5th Level Spell Slots
You can now cast 5th level spells.
Unlock 7th Level Spell Slots
You can now cast 7th level spells.
Unlock 8th Level Spell Slots
You can now cast 8th level spells.
Unlock 9th Level Spell Slots
You can now cast 9th level spells.
Studied Attacks
You study your foes' defences and exploit every opening. You gain a +2 bonus to weapon attack rolls.
Extra Attack (3)
You can attack four times whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.
Improved Brutal Strike

You have honed new ways to attack furiously. The following effects are now among your Brutal Strike options: <LSTag Type="ItemPassive" Tooltip="haa11111111111111111111111111b014">Staggering Blow</LSTag> and <LSTag Type="ItemPassive" Tooltip="haa11111111111111111111111111b018">Sundering Blow</LSTag>.
Improved Brutal Strike (17th Level)
The extra damage of your Brutal Strike increases to <LSTag Tooltip="DealDamage">2d10</LSTag>. In addition, you can use two different Brutal Strike effects whenever you use your Brutal Strike feature.
Indomitable Might

If your total for a Strength check or Strength saving throw is less than your Strength score, you can use that score in place of the total. Your minimum roll on Athletics checks and Strength saving throws is 24.
Primal Champion
You embody primal power. Your Strength and Constitution scores increase by 4, to a maximum of 25.
Deflect Energy
Your mastery of deflecting attacks hardens you against energy. You gain Resistance to Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, and Thunder damage.
Perfect Focus
Your focus runs deep. Your Ki reserves increase by 2 Ki Points.
Superior Defense
Spend 3 Ki Points to gain Resistance to all damage except Force for 10 turns.
Body and Mind
Your Dexterity and Wisdom scores increase by 4, to a maximum of 26.
Subtle Strikes
Your strikes are subtle and precise, granting you a +2 bonus to weapon attack rolls.
Elusive
You are maddeningly hard to pin down. While you aren't Incapacitated, attack rolls against you have Disadvantage.
Stroke of Luck
Fortune favours you. Your d20 rolls for Ability Checks, Skill Checks, and Saving Throws can't be lower than 10.
Cleansing Touch
As an action, cleanse yourself of harmful magic, ending the Charmed, Frightened, Poisoned, Diseased, and Cursed conditions. Recharges on a Short Rest.
Aura Expansion (30 ft)
Your paladin auras now extend to 30 feet instead of 10 feet.
Aura of Protection (30 ft)
Your protective aura extends to 9m. You and allied creatures within it cannot be Frightened.
Relentless Hunter
You gain a bonus to Initiative rolls and cannot be surprised while conscious.
Feral Senses
You can see Invisible creatures within 9m of you.
Foe Slayer
You add your Wisdom modifier to your weapon attack rolls and weapon damage rolls.
Spell Mastery
Choose a 1st-level and a 2nd-level spell. You can cast these spells at will without expending spell slots.
Signature Spells

Your mastery of your signature magic runs deep. Twice per Short Rest, when you cast a 3rd-level spell, its spell slot is refunded - letting you cast your favored 3rd-level spells without expending a slot.
Greater Divine Intervention
Call upon your deity for a miracle. As an action, once per Long Rest, you gain Advantage on all Attack rolls, Saving Throws, and Ability Checks, and 30 Temporary Hit Points, for 10 turns.
Beast Spells

While you are transformed by Wild Shape, you can still channel a portion of your primal magic. You gain access to a curated set of support spells - Healing Word, Cure Wounds, Lesser Restoration, Faerie Fire, and Moonbeam - along with a small pool of temporary Spell Slots to cast them, lasting until you return to your normal form.
Archdruid
Your Wild Shape is fully restored at the start of every combat and whenever you take a Short Rest, making your transformations effectively limitless.
Superior Inspiration
When you roll Initiative and have no Bardic Inspiration dice remaining, you regain one use.
Words of Creation

You have mastered two of the Words of Creation: the words of life and death. You always have <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Target_PowerWordHeal_WordsOfCreation">Power Word Heal</LSTag> and <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Target_PowerWordKill_WordsOfCreation">Power Word Kill</LSTag> prepared.
Power Word Kill
You utter a word of power that can compel one creature you can see to die instantly. If the target has 150 Hit Points or fewer, it dies. Otherwise, the word has no effect.
Power Word Heal
A wave of healing energy washes over the target, restoring all of its Hit Points and ending the Charmed, Frightened, Paralyzed, and Incapacitated conditions on it.
Arcane Apotheosis
Your command of raw magic is absolute. Once per turn, when you cast a spell of 1st level or higher, you regain 1 Sorcery Point.
Mystic Arcanum (7th)
Choose a 7th-level warlock spell. You can cast it once per Long Rest without expending a spell slot.
Mystic Arcanum (8th)
Choose an 8th-level warlock spell. You can cast it once per Long Rest without expending a spell slot.
Mystic Arcanum (9th)
Choose a 9th-level warlock spell. You can cast it once per Long Rest without expending a spell slot.
Eldritch Master
Once per Long Rest, as a Bonus Action, you entreat your patron to regain all your expended Pact Magic spell slots.
Magic Item Savant
Your deep attunement to magic items fortifies you against harm: you gain a +1 bonus to all Saving Throws.
Magic Item Master
Your command of magic items deepens further: you gain an additional +1 bonus to all Saving Throws and +1 to Armour Class.
Soul of Artifice

Your soul is bound to your creations. You gain a +2 bonus to all Saving Throws. The first time you would be reduced to 0 Hit Points, you drop to 1 Hit Point instead. This protection renews after a Long Rest.
Lightning Reload
Your rapid reloading lets you keep up a withering barrage. Your ranged weapon attacks deal an additional 1d4 damage, and you gain 1 additional Risk.
Vicious Intent
Your critical hit range with firearms is expanded to 19-20.
Hemorrhaging Critical
Your ranged weapon attacks deal an additional 1d6 damage. When you score a critical hit with a ranged weapon, the target takes an extra 2d6 Piercing damage.
Infernal Conduit
Your connection to the Hells deepens. You gain Resistance to Fire damage and 1 additional Seal.
Prince of Hell
You have become a true lord of the Nine Hells. You gain Resistance to Fire damage, your weapon attacks deal an additional 1d8 Necrotic damage, and your critical hit range is expanded by 1.
Mind Over Matter
Your mental fortitude protects your body. You gain resistance to psychic damage and advantage on saves against being charmed or frightened.
Psychic Mastery
Your psionic powers are greatly enhanced. Your psionic abilities deal additional damage and have improved effects.
Supreme Consciousness
You achieve the pinnacle of psychic power. Your mind transcends mortal limitations.
Survivor
At the start of each of your turns in combat, you regain 5 hit points.
Improved War Magic
When you use your action to cast a spell, you can make one weapon attack as a bonus action.
Relentless
Your reserve of battlefield techniques runs deep. You gain one additional Superiority Die.
Telekinetic Master
Telekinetic Thrust: Once per Long Rest, unleash a wave of telekinetic force in a 9m radius. Enemies must succeed on a Strength saving throw or take 4d8 Force damage and be pushed away.
Inspiring Surge (Improved)
Inspiring Surge: Once per Short Rest, as a Bonus Action, inspire allies within 9m. They gain Advantage on attack rolls and 10 temporary hit points for 2 turns.
Runic Juggernaut
While Giant's Might is active, you grow even larger and deal an extra 1d10 damage with weapon attacks.
Versatile Trickster
Direct your spectral hand to distract a creature within 18m as a Bonus Action. Attack rolls against the target have Advantage for 2 turns.
Infiltration Expertise
A master of infiltration. You gain Expertise in Stealth and a +5 bonus to Initiative.
Psychic Veil
As an action, veil yourself in psychic static and become Invisible until you attack, cast a spell, or force a creature to make a Saving Throw. Recharges on a Short Rest.
Use Magic Device
You can coax magic from any device. You gain Expertise in Arcana and Sleight of Hand.
Murderous Intent
Your sneak attacks become more deadly, channeling dark power from the Dead Three.
Unholy Infiltration
Your connection to the Dead Three grants you supernatural infiltration abilities. You have Advantage on Stealth and Deception checks, and your Darkvision extends to 18m.
Leading Evasion
When you are subjected to an effect that allows a Dexterity save for half damage, allies within 5 feet also benefit from your Evasion.
Unbreakable Majesty
As a bonus action, assume a majestic presence. For 1 minute, enemies must succeed on a Charisma save to attack you.
Controlled Chaos
When you roll on the Wild Magic Surge table, you can roll twice and use either result.
Tamed Surge
Your control over chaos is masterful, granting you an additional use of Tides of Chaos.
Dragon Wings
You can sprout draconic wings, gaining a flying speed equal to your walking speed.
Dragon Companion

You can summon the spirit of a dragon to fight at your side. You gain the Summon Draconic Spirit spell, which you can cast once per Long Rest without expending a spell slot. While the spirit is present you can't be Frightened.
Summon Draconic Spirit
Summon an incarnation of your draconic bloodline to a nearby space. The draconic spirit fights as your ally until your next Long Rest, or until you dismiss it.
Clockwork Cavalcade
Once per Short Rest, you call forth a cavalcade of clockwork spirits. Each ally within 9m regains 30 hit points and is cured of poison, disease, curses, and charm or fear effects.
Revelation in Flesh
Your flesh warps with aberrant power, granting you a flying speed and Superior Darkvision.
Warping Implosion

Once per Short Rest, you warp through space to a point you can see within 18m. A gravitational implosion erupts at the space you left, dealing 3d10 Force damage to creatures nearby, or half as much on a successful Dexterity saving throw.
Crown of Spellfire
Wreathed in a crown of spellfire, you are immune to Fire damage, and each of your spells deals an additional 1d4 Fire damage.
Battering Roots: Topple
Your weapon attacks can knock enemies prone.
Battering Roots: Push
Your weapon attacks can push enemies away.
Spell Resistance
You have advantage on saving throws against spells and resistance to spell damage.
Splintered Summons
Once per turn, casting a Conjuration spell that costs an action refunds that action, letting you summon for free.
Greater Portent
You roll three Portent dice instead of two.
Split Enchantment
Once per turn, casting an Enchantment spell that costs an action refunds that action, letting you cast it for free.
Alter Memories
You always have Modify Memory prepared, and your scrambling aura grips two enemies at once instead of one.
Overchannel
When you cast a spell of 5th level or lower, you can deal maximum damage. If you use this again before a Long Rest, you take necrotic damage.
Illusory Reality
Your illusions bleed into reality: whenever you deal Psychic damage, you also deal 1d4 Slashing, 1d4 Bludgeoning, 1d4 Piercing, and 1d4 Force damage.
Modify Memory

Wreathe yourself in a 6m aura of mind-scrambling magic that follows you. The aura grips one enemy at a time - two if you have Alter Memories - scrambling each mind with an even chance of being Held (Paralyzed) or Slowed. The effect lasts as long as the enemy stays in the aura; when one leaves or dies, the next enemy to have entered is gripped instead. Concentration, up to 10 turns.
Modify Memory
You radiate mind-scrambling magic, gripping nearby enemies - one at a time, or two with Alter Memories - and leaving each Held or Slowed while it remains in the aura.
Deaths Master

Grants Bolster Undead: as a Bonus Action, your nearby Undead gain Temporary Hit Points. While bolstered, each Undead is volatile - when it dies it erupts in a burst of necrotic energy, dealing 3d6 Necrotic damage (Dexterity save for half) to enemies around it.
Master Transmuter
You can consume your Transmuters Stone to produce a powerful effect: restore youth, raise dead, or transform into another creature.
Bewitching Magic
Your charm magic deepens. Whenever you cast an Enchantment or Illusion spell, your bewitching power surges, adding your Charisma modifier to your spell save DC for 2 turns.
Searing Vengeance

Once per Long Rest, when you are reduced to 0 hit points but not killed outright, you instead spring back up, regaining hit points equal to half your hit point maximum and unleashing a burst of celestial light: enemies within 6m take 4d6 Radiant damage (Constitution save for half) and are Blinded until the end of their next turn on a failed save.
Hurl Through Hell

Once per Short Rest, when you hit a creature with a weapon attack, you banish it through the Nine Hells, dealing an extra 10d10 Psychic damage. The creature briefly vanishes before being hurled back into the fray.
Create Thrall
Once per Long Rest, you can touch a creature and bend it to your will. It must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be Dominated, fighting at your side as your thrall.
Divine Foreknowledge
As a Bonus Action, glimpse the immediate future. For 10 turns you have Advantage on Attack rolls, Saving Throws, and Ability Checks. Once per Long Rest.
Supreme Healing

When you would normally roll one or more dice to restore Hit Points to a creature with a spell or Channel Divinity, don't roll those dice for the healing; instead use the highest number possible for each die.
Corona of Light
As an action, emit an aura of searing sunlight in an 18m radius for 10 turns. Enemies within the aura have Disadvantage on Saving Throws. Once per Short Rest.
Improved Duplicity
As a Bonus Action, surround yourself with illusory duplicates for 10 turns: your Attack rolls have Advantage, and attacks made against you have Disadvantage. Once per Short Rest.
Avatar of Battle
You gain Resistance to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage.
Natures Sanctuary
Nature shields you from the wild. Beasts and plants have Disadvantage on attack rolls against you.
Lunar Form
Moonlight suffuses your body. You gain Resistance to Radiant and Necrotic damage and Advantage on Constitution saving throws.
Oceanic Gift
Oceanic Gift: Once per Short Rest, as a Bonus Action, bless allies within 9m with the sea's protection, granting Resistance to Fire and Cold damage and 10 temporary hit points for 10 turns.
Full of Stars
Starry Form: Once per Short Rest, as a Bonus Action, take on a partially incorporeal starry form for 10 turns, gaining Resistance to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage.
Elemental Epitome
You have achieved mastery over the elements. Your Ki reserves increase by 3 Ki Points, and your spells deal additional damage equal to your Wisdom modifier.
Hand of Ultimate Mercy
Spend 5 Ki Points to touch a dead creature and restore it to life at full health.
Quivering Palm
Spend 3 Ki Points to set up lethal vibrations in a creature's body. It must succeed on a Constitution Saving Throw or take 10d12 Force damage (half on a success). Recharges on a Short Rest.
Cloak of Shadows
Spend 2 Ki Points to draw the shadows around yourself, becoming Invisible until you attack or cast a spell.
Smite of Protection
When you deal Radiant damage with a weapon attack, you gain 10 temporary hit points. Once per turn.
Holy Nimbus
Once per Short Rest, emit a burst of sunlight, dealing 2d8 Radiant damage to enemies within 9m. For 10 turns, you are immune to Radiant damage and have Advantage on Wisdom Saving Throws.
Glorious Defense
Radiant glory wards you, granting a +2 bonus to Armour Class.
Living Legend
You are a Living Legend. You have Advantage on Charisma ability checks (Persuasion, Deception, Intimidation, Performance) and gain a +2 bonus to weapon attack rolls.
Undying Sentinel
When you would be reduced to 0 hit points, you drop to 1 hit point instead. Once used, you cannot use this again until you finish a Long Rest.
Elder Champion

Once per Short Rest, transform into an avatar of nature for 10 turns: regain 30 hit points and gain Resistance to non-magical Bludgeoning, Slashing, and Piercing damage, immunity to being Frightened, and Advantage on attack rolls.
Elemental Rebuke
When a creature damages you with an attack, a burst of elemental energy strikes it for 2d8 Fire damage.
Noble Scion
The power of the genies fills you. You gain Resistance to Fire, Cold, Lightning, and Thunder damage.
Soul of Vengeance
Your vengeance is relentless. You have Advantage on attack rolls against Frightened creatures.
Avenging Angel
You sprout spectral wings, gaining the ability to Fly. Once per Short Rest, you can unleash a frightening aura, leaving enemies within 9m Frightened for 1 turn.
Share Spells
Your bond with your companion steadies your magic. You have Advantage on Constitution Saving Throws to maintain Concentration.
Misty Wanderer
Once per Short Rest, you can step through the Feywild, teleporting to an unoccupied space you can see without expending a spell slot.
Shadowy Dodge
As a Bonus Action, wreathe yourself in shadow until the start of your next turn. Attack rolls against you have Disadvantage. Recharges on a Short Rest.
Superior Hunters Defense
Defensive Tactics: You have Advantage on Dexterity Saving Throws, and all damage you take is reduced by 2.
Frozen Haunt
Your cold abilities are enhanced, leaving foes frozen in supernatural ice. You are Resistant to Cold damage, and enemies you deal Cold damage to are Chilled for 2 turns.
Chemical Mastery

You gain Resistance to Acid and Poison damage. Once per Long Rest, you can use Chemical Mastery to restore a creature to its full Hit Points and cleanse it of poison, disease, curses, charm, and fear, without expending a spell slot.
Chemical Mastery
Restore a creature to its full Hit Points and cleanse it of poison, disease, curses, charm, and fear. Usable once per Long Rest without expending a spell slot.
Perfected Armor
Your Arcane Armour is perfected: you gain a +2 bonus to Armour Class and Resistance to Force damage.
Fortified Position
You hold a fortified position behind your emplacements: you gain a +2 bonus to Armour Class and Resistance to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage.
Improved Defender
Your bond with your Steel Defender is perfected: you gain 2 additional Arcane Jolt charges per Long Rest, fuelling more frequent bursts of force damage and healing.
Focused Shot
When you take the Attack action, you can forgo one attack to gain advantage on your next attack this turn.
Double or Nothing
Lady Luck rides with you. You gain a +1 bonus to Attack Rolls and a +1 bonus to all Saving Throws.
License to Kill
Once per turn, when you hit a surprised creature, you deal extra damage equal to your Gunslinger level.
Magic Bullet
Your bullets are charged with arcane force. Your ranged weapon attacks deal an additional 1d6 Force damage.
Pinball Shot
When you hit a creature, you can ricochet to hit another creature within 10 feet.
Gold Star Hero
A shining paragon of justice. You gain a +1 bonus to Armour Class and a +1 bonus to all Saving Throws.
Vile Transmogrification
Your mastery of infernal magic deepens. You gain a +1 bonus to your Spell Save DC and a +1 bonus to all Saving Throws.
Hell Mage
You wield hellfire like a master. You gain a +1 bonus to your Spell Save DC and a +1 bonus to Spell Attack Rolls.
Quid Pro Quo
Every bargain bends to your favour. You gain Expertise in Persuasion and Deception.
Incontrovertible
Your words carry infernal weight. You have Advantage on Charisma checks and gain a +1 bonus to your Spell Save DC.
Deathstrike
Your strikes carry lethal finality. Your melee weapon attacks deal an additional 1d8 Necrotic damage.
Dispaters Supremacy
You embody the Iron Duke's resilience. You gain a +2 bonus to Armour Class and a +1 bonus to all Saving Throws.
Haemal Exchange
Blood answers blood. Your melee weapon attacks deal an additional 1d6 Necrotic damage.
Blood for Blood
Your blood wards you against harm. You gain a +1 bonus to Armour Class and Resistance to Necrotic damage.
Doomed to the Shadows
You strike from the darkness. You gain Advantage on Stealth checks, and your melee weapon attacks deal an additional 1d6 Necrotic damage.
Dark Malediction
Your curse clings to every blow. You gain a +1 bonus to Attack Rolls, and your weapon attacks deal an additional 1d8 Necrotic damage.
Scramble Minds
You can force multiple creatures to make Intelligence saves or be confused for 1 minute.
Heightened Telekinesis
Your telekinetic powers can affect Huge or larger creatures and deal additional force damage.
Psi Warper Feature
Your space-bending abilities allow you to teleport as a bonus action and bring allies with you.
Life-Bending Weapons
You can transform your limbs into deadly psionic weapons that deal 2d10 force damage.
Disciplined Survivor
Your mind and body are inseparable. You gain proficiency in all six Saving Throws.
Slippery Mind
Your mind is impossible to ensnare. You gain proficiency in Wisdom and Charisma Saving Throws.
Improved Blessed Strikes
Your divine strikes deal an additional 2d8 radiant damage instead of 1d8.
Improved Elemental Fury
Your elemental attacks deal an additional 2d8 damage of the same type instead of 1d8.
Staggered
Staggered by a brutal blow. Has Disadvantage on the next saving throw and cannot make Opportunity Attacks until the start of the attacker's next turn.
Cannot make Opportunity Attacks.
Sundered
Armor has been sundered. The next attack against this creature gains a +[1] bonus to the attack roll.
Forceful Blow
Forgo Advantage to deal an extra <LSTag Tooltip="DealDamage">1d10</LSTag> damage, push the target 15 feet away, and move up to half your Speed toward them without provoking Opportunity Attacks.
Forgo Advantage to deal an extra <LSTag Tooltip="DealDamage">2d10</LSTag> damage, push the target 15 feet away, and move up to half your Speed toward them without provoking Opportunity Attacks.
Push Distance: [1]
Hamstring Blow
Forgo Advantage to deal an extra <LSTag Tooltip="DealDamage">1d10</LSTag> damage and reduce the target's Speed by 15 feet until the start of your next turn.
Forgo Advantage to deal an extra <LSTag Tooltip="DealDamage">2d10</LSTag> damage and reduce the target's Speed by 15 feet until the start of your next turn.
Speed Reduction: [1]
Staggering Blow

Forgo Advantage to deal an extra <LSTag Tooltip="DealDamage">1d10</LSTag> damage. The target has Disadvantage on the next saving throw it makes, and cannot make Opportunity Attacks until the start of your next turn.

Forgo Advantage to deal an extra <LSTag Tooltip="DealDamage">2d10</LSTag> damage. The target has Disadvantage on the next saving throw it makes, and cannot make Opportunity Attacks until the start of your next turn.
Inflicts: Disadvantage on next save, Cannot make Opportunity Attacks
Sundering Blow

Forgo Advantage to deal an extra <LSTag Tooltip="DealDamage">1d10</LSTag> damage. Before the start of your next turn, the next attack roll made by another creature against the target gains a +5 bonus.

Forgo Advantage to deal an extra <LSTag Tooltip="DealDamage">2d10</LSTag> damage. Before the start of your next turn, the next attack roll made by another creature against the target gains a +5 bonus.
Next ally attack gains: +5 attack bonus
Forceful Hamstring
Forgo Advantage to deal an extra <LSTag Tooltip="DealDamage">2d10</LSTag> damage, push the target 15 feet away, move toward them, AND reduce their Speed by 15 feet.
Forceful Stagger

Forgo Advantage to deal an extra <LSTag Tooltip="DealDamage">2d10</LSTag> damage, push the target 15 feet away, move toward them, AND inflict Disadvantage on their next save while preventing Opportunity Attacks.
Forceful Sunder
Forgo Advantage to deal an extra <LSTag Tooltip="DealDamage">2d10</LSTag> damage, push the target 15 feet away, move toward them, AND grant the next attack against them a +5 bonus.
Crippling Stagger

Forgo Advantage to deal an extra <LSTag Tooltip="DealDamage">2d10</LSTag> damage, reduce the target's Speed by 15 feet, AND inflict Disadvantage on their next save while preventing Opportunity Attacks.
Crippling Sunder
Forgo Advantage to deal an extra <LSTag Tooltip="DealDamage">2d10</LSTag> damage, reduce the target's Speed by 15 feet, AND grant the next attack against them a +5 bonus.
Staggering Sunder

Forgo Advantage to deal an extra <LSTag Tooltip="DealDamage">2d10</LSTag> damage, inflict Disadvantage on their next save, prevent Opportunity Attacks, AND grant the next attack against them a +5 bonus.
Intimidating Presence

As a Bonus Action, strike terror into others. Each creature of your choice in a 30-foot Emanation must make a Wisdom saving throw or be Frightened for 1 minute. Once used, regain by finishing a Long Rest or expending a Rage use.
Power of the Wilds: Falcon
While your Rage is active, you have a Fly Speed equal to your Speed if you aren't wearing any armor.
Power of the Wilds: Lion
While your Rage is active, any of your enemies within 5 feet of you have Disadvantage on attack rolls against targets other than you.
Power of the Wilds: Ram
While your Rage is active, you can cause a Large or smaller creature to have the Prone condition when you hit it with a melee attack.
Falcon Spirit
You have a Fly Speed equal to your Speed while your Rage is active.
Lion Spirit
Enemies within 5 feet have Disadvantage on attacks against targets other than you.
Lion's Menace
Disadvantage on attack rolls against targets other than the Lion Barbarian.
Travel along the Tree
When you activate your Rage and as a Bonus Action while your Rage is active, you can teleport up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space you can see.
Travel along the Tree
Teleport up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space you can see.
Travel along the Tree
As a Bonus Action while Rage is active, teleport up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space you can see.
World Tree Connection
You can use Travel along the Tree as a Bonus Action while your Rage is active.
Rage of the Gods
When you activate your Rage, you can assume the form of a divine warrior for 1 minute. You gain Flight, and Resistance to Necrotic, Psychic, and Radiant damage. Once per Long Rest.
Rage of the Gods
Assume the form of a divine warrior. Gain Flight and Resistance to Necrotic, Psychic, and Radiant damage while your Rage is active.
Divine Warrior
You have assumed the form of a divine warrior. You have Flight and Resistance to Necrotic, Psychic, and Radiant damage.
Living Havok
When you enter your Rage, you roll on the Wild Magic table twice and also trigger a random effect from an enhanced Living Havok table, gaining two magical effects instead of one.
Force Explosion

Wild magic erupts from you in a concussive blast. Enemies within <LSTag Tooltip="Distance" Type="Distance">3m</LSTag> must make a Constitution saving throw or take <LSTag Tooltip="DealDamage">3d6 Force</LSTag> damage and become <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="DAZED">Dazed</LSTag> for 2 turns.
Surge of Action
Wild magic infuses you with incredible speed, granting you an additional Action this turn.
Twin Mephit Manifestation
Wild magic tears open small rifts, summoning two Mephits to fight by your side.
Temporal Acceleration
Wild magic warps time around you, granting you <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="HASTE">Haste</LSTag> for 5 turns.
Darkness Shroud
An aura of magical darkness envelops you, moving with you for the duration of your Rage. Creatures within 5m are <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="HEAVILY_OBSCURED">Heavily Obscured</LSTag>.
Darkness Shroud
Surrounded by an aura of magical darkness that moves with you. Creatures within 5m are Heavily Obscured.
Frozen Vortex

A swirling vortex of ice and hail surrounds you for 5 turns. Enemies within <LSTag Tooltip="Distance" Type="Distance">6m</LSTag> take <LSTag Tooltip="DealDamage">2d8 Cold</LSTag> + <LSTag Tooltip="DealDamage">2d8 Bludgeoning</LSTag> damage.
Frozen Vortex
Surrounded by a vortex of ice and hail. Enemies within 6m take 2d8 Cold + 2d8 Bludgeoning damage.
Frozen Vortex
Caught in a frozen vortex. Taking Cold and Bludgeoning damage.
Surge of Undeath

Necrotic energy pulses from you. Enemies within <LSTag Tooltip="Distance" Type="Distance">6m</LSTag> are marked - if they die within 3 turns, they rise as aggressive Zombies that attack all creatures.
Marked by Undeath
Marked by necrotic energy. If this creature dies, it will rise as an aggressive Zombie.
Lightning Strike
Wild magic discharges as a bolt of lightning toward the nearest enemy, dealing <LSTag Tooltip="DealDamage">8d6 Lightning</LSTag> damage (Dexterity save for half).
Temporal Backlash
The wild magic backfires, warping time against you. You are <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="SLOW">Slowed</LSTag> for 3 turns.
Power Word Kill
You speak a word of power that can compel one creature you can see to die instantly. If the creature has 100 hit points or fewer, it dies. Otherwise, the spell has no effect.
Power Word Heal

A wave of healing energy washes over a creature you can see. The target regains all its hit points. If the creature is <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="CHARMED">Charmed</LSTag>, <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="FRIGHTENED">Frightened</LSTag>, <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="PARALYZED">Paralyzed</LSTag>, <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="STUNNED">Stunned</LSTag>, <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="PRONE">Prone</LSTag>, <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="BLINDED">Blinded</LSTag>, or <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="DISEASED">Diseased</LSTag>, the condition ends.
Power Word Kill: Words of Creation

Speaking a word of death, you can compel up to two creatures within 10 feet of each other to die instantly. If a creature has 100 hit points or fewer, it dies. Otherwise, the spell has no effect on that creature.
Power Word Heal: Words of Creation

Speaking a word of life, a wave of healing energy washes over up to two creatures within 10 feet of each other. Each target regains all its hit points, and any <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="CHARMED">Charmed</LSTag>, <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="FRIGHTENED">Frightened</LSTag>, <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="PARALYZED">Paralyzed</LSTag>, <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="STUNNED">Stunned</LSTag>, <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="PRONE">Prone</LSTag>, <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="BLINDED">Blinded</LSTag>, or <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="DISEASED">Diseased</LSTag> conditions end.
Power Word Heal
A wave of healing energy washes over a creature you can see. The target regains all its hit points (up to 700). If the creature is Charmed, Frightened, Paralyzed, or Stunned, the condition ends.
Wish

The mightiest spell a mortal creature can cast. Simply by speaking aloud, you can alter reality itself. Choose from powerful effects: mass heal all allies, resurrect the fallen, or grant a divine blessing.
Wish: Mass Heal
Restore all allies within 18m to their maximum Hit Points.
Wish: Resurrection
Resurrect all dead allies within 9m with full Hit Points.
Wish: Divine Blessing
Grant all allies within 18m Advantage on all Attack Rolls, Ability Checks, and Saving Throws, plus Resistance to all damage types.
True Polymorph
Transform a creature into another creature or object. The transformation lasts until dispelled or the creature drops to 0 hit points.
Meteor Swarm

Blazing orbs of fire plummet to the ground at four different points you can see, creating massive explosions. Each creature in a 40-foot-radius sphere centered on each point must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 20d6 fire damage and 20d6 bludgeoning damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one.
Gate
You conjure a portal linking an unoccupied space you can see to a precise location on a different plane of existence.
Foresight

You touch a willing creature and bestow a limited ability to see into the immediate future. For the duration, the target can't be surprised and has advantage on attack rolls, ability checks, and saving throws. Other creatures have disadvantage on attack rolls against it.
Time Stop

You briefly stop the flow of time for everyone but yourself. You take 1d4+1 turns in a row, during which you can use actions and move as normal. This spell ends if you affect any creature other than yourself or an object being worn or carried by someone other than you.
Mass Heal

A flood of healing energy flows from you into injured creatures around you. You restore up to 700 hit points, divided as you choose among any number of creatures that you can see within range. Creatures healed are also cured of diseases and any effect making them blinded or deafened.
Prismatic Wall
A shimmering, multicolored plane of light forms a vertical opaque wall. Each layer has a different color and effect on creatures that pass through it.
Spell Mastery: Level 1 Selection
Choose a level 1 spell to cast at will.
Spell Mastery: Level 2 Selection
Choose a level 2 spell to cast at will.
Spell Mastery: Selecting Spells
Choose a level 1 and a level 2 spell from your spellbook to cast at will.
Spell Mastery

You have achieved such mastery over certain spells that you can cast them at will. Choose a level 1 and a level 2 spell in your spellbook that have a casting time of an action. You always have those spells prepared, and you can cast them at their lowest level without expending a spell slot. Whenever you finish a Long Rest, you can study your spellbook and replace one of those spells with an eligible spell of the same level.
Spell Mastery
Open your spellbook to select your mastered spells. Choose one level 1 and one level 2 spell to cast at will without expending spell slots. Your choices reset on Long Rest.
Master: Burning Hands
Select Burning Hands as your mastered level 1 spell. You can cast it at will without expending a spell slot.
Master: Charm Person
Select Charm Person as your mastered level 1 spell. You can cast it at will without expending a spell slot.
Master: Chromatic Orb
Select Chromatic Orb as your mastered level 1 spell. You can cast it at will without expending a spell slot.
Master: Color Spray
Select Color Spray as your mastered level 1 spell. You can cast it at will without expending a spell slot.
Master: Disguise Self
Select Disguise Self as your mastered level 1 spell. You can cast it at will without expending a spell slot.
Master: Expeditious Retreat
Select Expeditious Retreat as your mastered level 1 spell. You can cast it at will without expending a spell slot.
Master: False Life
Select False Life as your mastered level 1 spell. You can cast it at will without expending a spell slot.
Master: Feather Fall
Select Feather Fall as your mastered level 1 spell. You can cast it at will without expending a spell slot.
Master: Find Familiar
Select Find Familiar as your mastered level 1 spell. You can cast it at will without expending a spell slot.
Master: Fog Cloud
Select Fog Cloud as your mastered level 1 spell. You can cast it at will without expending a spell slot.
Master: Grease
Select Grease as your mastered level 1 spell. You can cast it at will without expending a spell slot.
Master: Hideous Laughter
Select Tasha's Hideous Laughter as your mastered level 1 spell. You can cast it at will without expending a spell slot.
Master: Jump
Select Jump as your mastered level 1 spell. You can cast it at will without expending a spell slot.
Master: Longstrider
Select Longstrider as your mastered level 1 spell. You can cast it at will without expending a spell slot.
Master: Mage Armor
Select Mage Armor as your mastered level 1 spell. You can cast it at will without expending a spell slot.
Master: Magic Missile
Select Magic Missile as your mastered level 1 spell. You can cast it at will without expending a spell slot.
Master: Protection from Evil and Good
Select Protection from Evil and Good as your mastered level 1 spell. You can cast it at will without expending a spell slot.
Master: Ray of Sickness
Select Ray of Sickness as your mastered level 1 spell. You can cast it at will without expending a spell slot.
Master: Sleep
Select Sleep as your mastered level 1 spell. You can cast it at will without expending a spell slot.
Master: Shield
Select Shield as your mastered level 1 spell. You can cast it at will without expending a spell slot.
Master: Thunderwave
Select Thunderwave as your mastered level 1 spell. You can cast it at will without expending a spell slot.
Master: Witch Bolt
Select Witch Bolt as your mastered level 1 spell. You can cast it at will without expending a spell slot.
Master: Acid Arrow
Select Melf's Acid Arrow as your mastered level 2 spell. You can cast it at will without expending a spell slot.
Master: Blindness
Select Blindness as your mastered level 2 spell. You can cast it at will without expending a spell slot.
Master: Cloud of Daggers
Select Cloud of Daggers as your mastered level 2 spell. You can cast it at will without expending a spell slot.
Master: Crown of Madness
Select Crown of Madness as your mastered level 2 spell. You can cast it at will without expending a spell slot.
Master: Blur
Select Blur as your mastered level 2 spell. You can cast it at will without expending a spell slot.
Master: Darkness
Select Darkness as your mastered level 2 spell. You can cast it at will without expending a spell slot.
Master: Darkvision
Select Darkvision as your mastered level 2 spell. You can cast it at will without expending a spell slot.
Master: Detect Thoughts
Select Detect Thoughts as your mastered level 2 spell. You can cast it at will without expending a spell slot.
Master: Enlarge/Reduce
Select Enlarge/Reduce as your mastered level 2 spell. You can cast it at will without expending a spell slot.
Master: Flaming Sphere
Select Flaming Sphere as your mastered level 2 spell. You can cast it at will without expending a spell slot.
Master: Hold Person
Select Hold Person as your mastered level 2 spell. You can cast it at will without expending a spell slot.
Master: Invisibility
Select Invisibility as your mastered level 2 spell. You can cast it at will without expending a spell slot.
Master: Magic Weapon
Select Magic Weapon as your mastered level 2 spell. You can cast it at will without expending a spell slot.
Master: Mirror Image
Select Mirror Image as your mastered level 2 spell. You can cast it at will without expending a spell slot.
Master: Misty Step
Select Misty Step as your mastered level 2 spell. You can cast it at will without expending a spell slot.
Master: Phantasmal Force
Select Phantasmal Force as your mastered level 2 spell. You can cast it at will without expending a spell slot.
Master: Ray of Enfeeblement
Select Ray of Enfeeblement as your mastered level 2 spell. You can cast it at will without expending a spell slot.
Master: Scorching Ray
Select Scorching Ray as your mastered level 2 spell. You can cast it at will without expending a spell slot.
Master: Shatter
Select Shatter as your mastered level 2 spell. You can cast it at will without expending a spell slot.
Master: Web
Select Web as your mastered level 2 spell. You can cast it at will without expending a spell slot.
Prismatic Spray
Unleash rays of prismatic light in a [1] cone. Choose which elemental ray to release - each creature in the area must make a Dexterity Saving Throw or take [2] damage (half on a successful save).
Prismatic Spray: Fire
Release a red ray of fire in a [1] cone. Each creature in the area must make a Dexterity Saving Throw or take [2] damage (half on a successful save).
Prismatic Spray: Acid
Release an orange ray of acid in a [1] cone. Each creature in the area must make a Dexterity Saving Throw or take [2] damage (half on a successful save).
Prismatic Spray: Lightning
Release a yellow ray of lightning in a [1] cone. Each creature in the area must make a Dexterity Saving Throw or take [2] damage (half on a successful save).
Prismatic Spray: Poison
Release a green ray of poison in a [1] cone. Each creature in the area must make a Dexterity Saving Throw or take [2] damage (half on a successful save).
Prismatic Spray: Cold
Release a blue ray of cold in a [1] cone. Each creature in the area must make a Dexterity Saving Throw or take [2] damage (half on a successful save).
Regenerate
Touch a creature to restore [1] Hit Points. For 1 hour, the target regains [2] at the start of each of its turns.
Regenerating [1] at the start of each turn.
Resurrection
Return a dead creature to life with 1 Hit Point. The creature must have died within the last century.
Project Image
Create an illusory duplicate of yourself at any location within range. You can see and hear through the duplicate and cast spells as if you were in its space. Requires Concentration.
Projecting an illusory image. Advantage on Deception and Performance checks.
Power Word Stun

Speak a word of power that can overwhelm the mind of one creature you can see. If the target has [1] Hit Points or fewer, it is <LSTag Tooltip="STUNNED">Stunned</LSTag>. At the end of each of its turns, the target can make a Constitution Saving Throw to end this effect.
Glibness

For 1 hour, when you make a Charisma check, you can replace the number you roll with a 15. Additionally, no matter what you say, magic that would determine if you are telling the truth indicates you are being truthful.
Charisma checks cannot roll below 15. Cannot be detected as lying by magic.
Feeblemind

Blast a creature's mind, dealing [1] and shattering its intellect. On a failed Intelligence Saving Throw, the target's Intelligence and Charisma scores become 1. The creature can't cast spells, activate magic items, or communicate until cured.
Intelligence and Charisma reduced to 1. Cannot cast spells or communicate effectively.
Foresight

Touch a willing creature and grant it limited ability to see into the immediate future. For 8 hours, the target has <LSTag Tooltip="Advantage">Advantage</LSTag> on Attack Rolls, Ability Checks, and Saving Throws. Other creatures have <LSTag Tooltip="Disadvantage">Disadvantage</LSTag> on Attack Rolls against it.
Limited foresight grants Advantage on all d20 rolls. Attackers have Disadvantage.
True Polymorph
Transform a creature or object into a different creature or object. If you concentrate on this spell for the full duration, the transformation becomes permanent.
Transformed into another form.
Greater Divine Intervention: Wish
Through your Greater Divine Intervention, you can invoke the power of a Wish spell. Choose from powerful divine effects: heal all allies, resurrect the fallen, or grant divine blessing.
Wish: Mass Heal
Restore all allies within 30 feet to their maximum Hit Points.
Wish: Resurrection
Resurrect a dead ally within 30 feet with full Hit Points.
Wish: Divine Blessing
Grant all allies within 30 feet Advantage on all D20 tests and Resistance to all damage types.
Wish Blessing
Blessed by a Wish spell. Advantage on all Attack Rolls, Ability Checks, and Saving Throws. Resistance to all damage types.
Divine Foreknowledge

As a Bonus Action, magically expand your mind to the future. For 1 hour, you have Advantage on all D20 Tests (Attack Rolls, Ability Checks, and Saving Throws). You can use this feature once per Long Rest.
Your mind is expanded to perceive the future. Advantage on all Attack Rolls, Ability Checks, and Saving Throws.
Corona of Light

As a Magic action, emit an aura of sunlight for 1 minute. Enemies in the 60-foot Bright Light have Disadvantage on saving throws against your Radiance of the Dawn and any spell that deals Fire or Radiant damage. Usable once per Short Rest.
Emitting a Corona of Light. Enemies within 60 feet have Disadvantage on saves against Fire and Radiant damage spells.
Corona of Light (Weakened)
In the Corona of Light. Disadvantage on saving throws against Fire and Radiant damage spells.
Improved Reaper

Your mastery of death magic has reached its apex. When you reduce a creature to 0 Hit Points with a spell that deals Necrotic damage, you unleash a wave of deathly energy that deals Necrotic damage equal to your Wisdom modifier to all enemies within 15 feet of the slain creature.
Keeper of Souls
You shepherd departing souls to their rest. When you reduce an enemy to 0 Hit Points, you regain 2d8 Hit Points. Once per turn.
As a reaction when an enemy dies within 60 feet, heal yourself or an ally.
Keeper of Souls: Healing
Channel the departing soul's energy to heal a creature within 60 feet.
Dominate Monster

Attempt to beguile a creature you can see within range. It must succeed on a <LSTag Tooltip="Wisdom">Wisdom</LSTag> saving throw or become <LSTag Tooltip="Charmed">Charmed</LSTag> for the duration. While charmed, you have a telepathic link with it. You can use this telepathic link to issue commands to the creature (no action required), which it does its best to obey. Each time the target takes damage, it makes a new Wisdom saving throw against the spell. If it succeeds, the spell ends.
Dominated
Charmed by the caster and under their control. Each time this creature takes damage, it can attempt a <LSTag Tooltip="Wisdom">Wisdom</LSTag> saving throw to break free.
Lethal Quarry
You always find the weak point. Your critical hit threshold is reduced by 1 (you score a critical hit on a roll of 19-20).
Primal Accuracy
Your studied strikes land with brutal precision. Your weapon and unarmed attacks deal an additional 1d6 damage.
Hardened Resolve
Years of hunting horrors steel your mind. You gain a +1 bonus to all Saving Throws and Resistance to Psychic damage.
Apex Predator
You dominate the hunt. You gain a +1 bonus to Armour Class and a +1 bonus to Attack Rolls.
Master Hunter
You are the deadliest hunter alive. Your weapon and unarmed attacks deal an additional 1d10 damage, and you gain a +1 bonus to Armour Class.
Stacked Deck
The odds bend to your favour. You gain a +1 bonus to Attack Rolls and a +1 bonus to all Saving Throws.
Jackpot
Your biggest bets pay off in blood. Your critical hit threshold with ranged weapons is reduced by 1.
Arcane Barrage
Your shots crackle with arcane power. Your ranged weapon attacks deal an additional 1d8 Force damage.
Spell Storm
Your magic reaches its peak. You gain a +1 bonus to your Spell Save DC and a +1 bonus to Spell Attack Rolls.
Peacekeeper
You stand as an unyielding guardian. You gain a +1 bonus to Armour Class and a +1 bonus to all Saving Throws.
Lawgiver's Reach
None escape justice. You gain a +1 bonus to Attack Rolls, and your ranged weapon attacks deal an additional 1d6 damage.
Bulwark
Your guild armour turns aside the worst blows. You gain a +1 bonus to Armour Class and Resistance to Bludgeoning damage.
Executioner
You finish your quarry without mercy. Your melee weapon attacks deal an additional 1d8 damage.
Ravenous Might
Your mutated body corrodes your foes. Your melee weapon attacks deal an additional 1d6 Acid damage.
Apex Metabolism
Your body shrugs off toxins. You gain a +1 bonus to all Saving Throws and Resistance to Poison damage.
Spellbreaker's Focus
Your occult training fortifies you against magic. You gain a +1 bonus to your Spell Save DC and a +1 bonus to all Saving Throws.
Arcane Nemesis
You are a bane to spellcasters. You have Advantage on all Saving Throws against spells.
Arcane Charge
Your martial strikes crackle with arcane power. Your weapon attacks deal an additional 1d8 Force damage.
Spell Thief
You twist hostile magic to your advantage. You gain a +1 bonus to your Spell Save DC and a +2 bonus to all Saving Throws.
Death Strike
Your opening blows are lethal. Your weapon attacks against Surprised creatures deal an additional 4d6 damage.
Shared Resilience
Your unbreakable bearing fortifies you against harm. You gain a +2 bonus to Saving Throws and +1 Armour Class.
Battle Magic
When you cast a Spell using an action, you can make a weapon attack as a Bonus Action.
Murderous Intent
Your killer instinct sharpens every strike. Your weapon attacks score Critical Hits on a roll 1 lower and deal an additional 1d6 Necrotic damage.
Improved Blessed Strikes
Divine power flows through your attacks and spells. Your weapon attacks deal an additional 1d8 Radiant damage, and your Spells deal additional damage equal to your Wisdom modifier.
Eventide's Splendor
You are wreathed in moonlight. You gain Resistance to Radiant and Cold damage, and your Spells deal an additional 1d4 Radiant damage.
Peerless Skill
Your talents never fail you. Your Ability Checks for skills cannot roll lower than 8, and you gain Expertise in Persuasion and Performance.
Bulwark of Force
A telekinetic barrier shields you. You gain +2 Armour Class and Resistance to Force damage.
Master of Runes
Your runes burn with greater power. While Giant's Might is active, you gain +2 Armour Class and a +2 bonus to Saving Throws.
Rend Mind
Your psychic blades tear at the mind. Your weapon attacks deal an additional 1d6 Psychic damage, and you gain a +1 bonus to Attack Rolls.
Honed Spellfire
You have mastered your inner flame. You gain Resistance to Fire damage, and your Spells deal an additional 1d4 Fire damage.
Superior Critical
Your weapon attacks score a Critical Hit on a roll of 18-20.
Master's Flourish
Your blade dances with deadly precision. Your weapon attacks deal an additional 1d6 damage and gain a +1 bonus to Attack Rolls.
Thief's Reflexes
Your reflexes are supernaturally swift. You gain an additional Bonus Action each turn and a +5 bonus to Initiative.
Trance of Order
You perceive the clockwork of fate. Your Saving Throws and Ability Checks cannot roll lower than 10.
Unlock 7th Level Spell Slots
Unlock 8th Level Spell Slots
Unlock 9th Level Spell Slots
Delayed Blast Fireball
A bead of fire streaks out and detonates with catastrophic force, dealing 12d6 Fire damage to everything caught in the blast.
Divine Word
You speak a word of the First Language. Wounded enemies around you that fail a Charisma save are struck down, stunned, or blinded according to how badly hurt they already are.
Finger of Death
Negative energy ravages a creature for 7d8+30 Necrotic damage (Constitution save for half). A humanoid slain by this spell rises at the start of the next turn as a zombie under your command.
Fire Storm
A storm of roaring flame fills a wide area, dealing 7d10 Fire damage (Dexterity save for half).
Prismatic Spray
Eight rays of clashing colour flash from your hand in a cone, battering everything caught in them with 2d6 each of Fire, Cold, Lightning, Acid and Poison damage (Dexterity save for half).
Forcecage
A cage of invisible force imprisons an enemy for 3 turns: it cannot act, and nothing can harm it. No saving throw, no concentration.
Mordenkainen's Sword
You conjure a blade of pure force that fights at your command, striking with the strength of a 7th-level summoning.
Conjure Celestial
A celestial spirit surrounds you: enemies within 9m suffer 3d8 Radiant damage each turn (Wisdom save), while nearby allies are continually Blessed.
Etherealness
You step partly into the Ethereal Plane for 10 turns: unseen by material eyes and drifting free, with greatly extended movement.
Mirage Arcane
You rewrite the terrain in enemy minds across a huge area. Those who fail an Intelligence save wander lost: Slowed for 3 turns and Blinded for 2.
Mordenkainen's Magnificent Mansion
The mansion's door opens a crack: allies around you snatch a moment of its comfort, healing 4d8 and gaining Sanctuary for 2 turns.
Plane Shift
You hurl an enemy through the planes. On a failed Charisma save it is banished for 3 turns - no concentration required.
Power Word Fortify
A word of pure vitality wraps a creature in 60 temporary hit points.
Reverse Gravity
Gravity inverts across the area: creatures that fail a Dexterity save are slammed skyward and back down for 6d6 Bludgeoning damage and knocked Prone.
Sequester
You hide an ally outside the world's reach: for 3 turns nothing can touch them, and they cannot act.
Simulacrum
A snow-built double acts through you for 5 turns, granting an additional action and bonus action each round.
Symbol
A glyph of stunning power erupts: creatures in the area that fail an Intelligence save take 7d10 Psychic damage and are Stunned for a turn.
Teleport
You vanish and reappear anywhere you can see, up to 30m away.
Animal Shapes
Allies around you take on bestial vigour for 10 turns: 30 temporary hit points and surging speed.
Antimagic Field
A 3m sphere of dead magic follows you for 10 turns: enemies inside are continually Silenced, strangling their casting.
Antipathy/Sympathy
You become anathema to one creature: on a failed Wisdom save it is Frightened of you for 5 turns.
Befuddlement
You blast the mind of a creature, shattering its intellect and personality (PHB 2024 successor to Feeblemind).
Clone
A hidden clone stands ready. The next time the target falls, the clone takes their place: they rise again at full strength.
Control Weather
You bend the sky itself: for 5 turns a storm rages 18m around you, shocking enemies for 2d10 Lightning damage each turn (Constitution save).
Demiplane
You shove an ally through a shadowy door into your demiplane: for 2 turns nothing can reach them, and they cannot act.
Dominate Monster
You seize the will of any creature - beast, fiend, dragon or worse. On a failed Wisdom save it fights for you.
Earthquake
The ground heaves across a huge area: creatures that fail a Dexterity save take 5d12 Bludgeoning damage and are knocked Prone amid the churned earth.
Holy Aura
Divine radiance mantles you for 5 turns: allies within 9m are continually Blessed.
Incendiary Cloud
A roiling cloud of embers ignites: creatures inside take 10d8 Fire damage (Dexterity save for half) and the ground burns on.
Maze
You cast an enemy into an extradimensional labyrinth. On a failed Intelligence save it is gone for 2 turns, wandering the maze.
Mind Blank
Until your next long rest, one creature's mind is a locked vault: immune to Psychic damage and to being Charmed.
Sunburst
Brilliant sunlight flashes in a 9m sphere: 12d6 Radiant damage, and creatures that fail a Constitution save are Blinded for 2 turns.
Telepathy
You forge a telepathic bond with an ally until your next long rest, steeling their mind: advantage on Wisdom, Intelligence and Charisma saving throws.
Tsunami
A wall of water crashes through everything before you: 6d10 Bludgeoning damage (Dexterity save for half), leaving the ground awash.
Astral Projection
Your silver-corded astral self takes the field for 10 turns: flying free, with your material body's wounds dulled to resistance against physical harm.
Imprisonment
You bind a creature outside time and space. On a failed Wisdom save it is Petrified - permanently, until someone breaks the binding.
Shapechange
You assume a colossal primal form for 10 turns: 60 temporary hit points, hardened hide, and tremendous stride.
Storm of Vengeance
A churning stormcloud blankets the battlefield for 5 turns: every enemy within 18m is lashed for 4d6 Lightning damage each turn (Constitution save).
True Resurrection
You restore a dead companion to life whole and unmarred: full hit points and a lingering blessing.
Weird
You drag every enemy in the area into their own worst nightmare: 12d10 Psychic damage (Wisdom save for half), and those who fail are Frightened for 2 turns.
Death's Finger
Marked by Finger of Death. If this creature dies now, it rises as a zombie serving its killer.
Ethereal Drift
Partly in the Ethereal Plane: movement is greatly extended.
Fortified
Wrapped in 60 temporary hit points by a word of power.
Simulacrum
A snow-built double acts through you: an additional action and bonus action each round.
Bestial Vigour
Primal shape flows through you: 30 temporary hit points and surging speed.
Clone Standing By
A hidden clone waits. The next time you fall, you rise again at full strength.
Mind Blank
This mind is a locked vault: immune to Psychic damage and to being Charmed.
Telepathic Bond
A steadying voice in your mind: advantage on Wisdom, Intelligence and Charisma saving throws.
Astral Form
Your material wounds are far away: resistant to Slashing, Piercing and Bludgeoning damage.
Colossal Form
A towering primal shape: 60 temporary hit points, +2 Armour Class and tremendous stride.
Celestial Spirit
A celestial spirit attends you: enemies within 9m suffer radiant wrath; allies are continually Blessed.
Celestial Wrath
Scoured by celestial radiance.
Stormcall
A storm-cell rages 18m around you, shocking enemies each turn.
Storm-Shocked
Lashed by summoned lightning.
Storm of Vengeance
A vengeful stormcloud blankets 18m around you.
Vengeance-Struck
Lashed by the storm of vengeance.
Antimagic Field
A sphere of dead magic: enemies inside are continually Silenced.
Holy Aura
Divine radiance mantles you: allies within 9m are continually Blessed.
